text.title: Agent Rollback Button Design Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the bundle (prompt + schema + tools + model + eval-set) atomically defined?

branch.when: bundle_defined == true AND state_partitioned == true AND eval_gate_available == true

conclusion.verdict: Ship the spec. All preconditions met.

branch.when: bundle_defined == true AND state_partitioned == true AND eval_gate_available == false

conclusion.verdict: Split — build the golden eval set first; rollback without a gate is reckless.
Split — separate customer state from agent state at the schema level before designing the button.
Escalate — a closed-source dependency or human-managed prompt store prevents atomic rollback.
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.
